title: To His Kinsman, M. Tho. Herrick, Who Desired To Be In His Book.
content:
Welcome to this my college, and though late
    Thou'st got a place here (standing candidate)
    It matters not, since thou art chosen one
    Here of my great and good foundation.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "To His Kinsman, M. Tho. Herrick, Who Desired To Be In His Book."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
